title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus
key_message: No licensed vaccine or specific therapeutics against Bundibugyo virus; early supportive care is lifesaving.

title: The Bundibugyo virus challenge: why is this Ebola disease outbreak different
key_message: Explains why Bundibugyo outbreak is different, including lack of approved vaccines for this species and response challenges.

title: Statement on vaccine efforts relating to the Bundibugyo Ebolavirus outbreak in the DRC
key_message: Oxford Vaccine Group is working with Oxford CBF and Serum Institute to produce and scale ChAdOx1 BDBV candidate vaccine doses.

title: Experts convened by WHO advise on candidate treatments and vaccines for Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus
key_message: WHO convened expert groups to assess candidate vaccines and therapeutics for prevention and treatment of BVD.

title: What Bundibugyo Ebola vaccines and treatments are in development
key_message: Summarizes candidate vaccines including IAVI rVSV Bundibugyo candidate and other development efforts.

title: Three Ebola vaccine candidates fast-tracked as African outbreak continues
key_message: Reports fast-tracking of vaccine candidates and summarizes outbreak context.
